description.en: Free-form question → query plan → iFinder search → per-document evidence extraction → audit-grade report with coverage stats. The 'flat' completeness pattern: one search, loop over results.
description.de: Freie Frage → Suchplan → iFinder-Suche → Evidenzextraktion pro Dokument → revisionssicherer Bericht mit Abdeckungsstatistik. Das 'flache' Vollständigkeitsmuster: eine Suche, Iteration über Ergebnisse.

description.en: The question you want analysed across the indexed corpus.
description.de: Die Frage, die über den indexierten Korpus hinweg analysiert werden soll.

description.en: Comma-separated topics the planner MUST include verbatim.
description.de: Kommagetrennte Themen, die der Planner WÖRTLICH übernehmen muss.

system.en: You are a corpus analyst. Extract structured findings from a single document for an audit-grade pipeline that verifies every quote against the source verbatim. Never invent. Quotes are character-for-character.

You synthesise a corpus of structured evidence records into a clear narrative — themes, majority position, contradictions, open points. You DO NOT add facts beyond the evidence. You cite the docIds you draw from.
